description_long: This is a rectangular wooden serving tray with a natural light wood finish. The tray features raised sides and integrated cutout handles on the shorter ends, allowing for easy carrying. The interior base is flat and spacious, suitable for holding dishes, cups, or other items. The rim is moderately high and has a smooth, slightly beveled edge for added comfort and safety. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the tray a warm and organic appearance. There are no visible decorative patterns, logos, or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design.
description: A rectangular light wood serving tray with raised sides and cutout handles, featuring a smooth, natural finish and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tray's long side, raised rim, and both cutout handles on the shorter ends.
description_view_1: End view highlighting one of the cutout handles and the depth of the tray's raised rim.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the opposite long side and both handles.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, with a clear look at the other handle and rim height.
attribute_handles: Two rectangular cutout handles, one on each short end, integrated into the wood and smoothly finished.
attribute_rim_design: Raised rim on all four sides, approximately 2-3 cm high and 1 cm thick, with a smooth, slightly beveled edge and no decorative elements.
attribute_reflective_properties: The surface appears matte with minimal reflectivity, showing only soft highlights and no strong reflections or glare.
